mapper.insert: insert into out_stock (goods_id, warehouse_id, owner_id, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, operator_id, out_time, remark) values (#{goodsId}, #{warehouseId}, #{ownerId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalAmount}, #{operatorId}, #{outTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select s.*, g.goods_name, g.goods_code, w.warehouse_name, o.owner_name, u.real_name as operator_name from out_stock s left join goods g on s.goods_id=g.goods_id left join warehouse w on s.warehouse_id=w.warehouse_id left join owner o on s.owner_id=o.owner_id left join sys_user u on s.operator_id=u.user_id order by s.out_time desc

select s.*, g.goods_name, g.goods_code, w.warehouse_name, o.owner_name, u.real_name as operator_name from out_stock s left join goods g on s.goods_id=g.goods_id left join warehouse w on s.warehouse_id=w.warehouse_id left join owner o on s.owner_id=o.owner_id left join sys_user u on s.operator_id=u.user_id where s.out_id=#{id}

select
YEAR(s.out_time) as period,
CONCAT(YEAR(s.out_time), '-Q', QUARTER(s.out_time)) as period,
DATE_FORMAT(s.out_time, '%Y-%m') as period,
DATE_FORMAT(s.out_time, '%Y-%m') as period,
SUM(s.quantity) as total_quantity, SUM(s.total_amount) as total_amount, COUNT(*) as record_count from out_stock s left join goods g on s.goods_id=g.goods_id where 1=1
and g.goods_name like concat('%',#{goodsName},'%')
and g.category_id=#{categoryId}
and s.out_time >= #{startTime}
and s.out_time <= #{endTime}
group by period order by period desc
